title: MariaDB CDC Streaming
description: Actor interactions for streaming MariaDB binlog change events to Kafka

actors.name: KafkaConnect
actors.description: Kafka Connect platform that deploys and manages the connector lifecycle

actors.name: MariaDbConnector
actors.description: Top-level Kafka Connect connector; extends BinlogConnector<MariaDbConnectorConfig>, implements ConfigDescriptor. Creates MariaDbConnectorTask.

actors.name: MariaDbConnectorTask
actors.description: Extends BinlogSourceTask. Bootstraps full CDC pipeline: validates binlog config, creates ChangeEventQueue, ErrorHandler, EventDispatcher, ChangeEventSourceCoordinator.

actors.name: BinaryLogClient
actors.description: shyiko mysql-binlog-connector library. Connects to MariaDB and streams raw binlog events.

actors.name: MariaDbStreamingChangeEventSource
actors.description: Extends BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource. Handles MariaDB-specific logic: MARIADB_GTID events, ANNOTATE_ROWS (SQL query capture), GTID set management, SSL mode mapping.

actors.name: EventDispatcher
actors.description: Routes parsed change events to ChangeEventQueue with topic naming, filters, heartbeat, and schema changes.

actors.name: MariaDbErrorHandler
actors.description: Extends ErrorHandler. Classifies IOException/SQLException as communication exceptions. Non-retriable: error code 1236 (ER_MASTER_FATAL_ERROR_READING_BINLOG).

actors.name: BinlogSourceInfo
actors.description: Tracks current binlog position: file, pos, GTID, server_id, thread_id, query, tableIds, sourceTime.

actors.name: Kafka
actors.description: Target message broker receiving serialized change event records

use_cases.name: Deploy Connector
use_cases.description: KafkaConnect instantiates MariaDbConnector, calls taskClass() → returns MariaDbConnectorTask

use_cases.name: Validate Binlog Configuration
use_cases.description: Calls validateBinlogConfiguration(snapshotter, connection): asserts binlog_format=ROW and binlog_row_image=FULL via BinlogConnectorConnection.isBinlogFormatRow() / isBinlogRowImageFull()

use_cases.name: Bootstrap CDC Pipeline
use_cases.description: start(): creates MariaDbConnectorConfig, MariaDbDatabaseSchema, ChangeEventQueue, MariaDbErrorHandler, EventDispatcher, BinaryLogClient, MariaDbStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics, ChangeEventSourceCoordinator

use_cases.name: Connect to MariaDB Binlog
use_cases.description: BinaryLogClient.connect() to MariaDB host:port with credentials. Sets mariaDbSlaveCapability=4 for GTID compatibility. Optionally enables ANNOTATE_ROWS (setUseSendAnnotateRowsEvent=true) when sql.query.include=true.

use_cases.name: Stream Binlog Events
use_cases.description: Delivers raw Event objects to registered EventListener in BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource.execute(). Dispatches to typed handlers: STOP, HEARTBEAT, ROTATE, TABLE_MAP, QUERY, WRITE_ROWS, UPDATE_ROWS, DELETE_ROWS, XID, TRANSACTION_PAYLOAD.

use_cases.name: Handle GTID Transaction
use_cases.description: handleGtidEvent(): extracts MariadbGtidEventData, constructs GTID string (domainId-serverId-sequence), updates MariaDbGtidSet, calls offsetContext.startGtid(), then handleTransactionBegin().

use_cases.name: Track Binlog Position
use_cases.description: BinlogSourceInfo.setBinlogPosition(file, pos) on ROTATE events. Stores file, pos, GTID, server_id, thread_id, query for offset commits.

use_cases.name: Dispatch DML Change Events
use_cases.description: handleInsert/handleUpdate/handleDelete(): parses WriteRowsEventData/UpdateRowsEventData/DeleteRowsEventData, emits Envelope.Operation.CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE via EventDispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent()

use_cases.name: Capture SQL Query (ANNOTATE_ROWS)
use_cases.description: handleRecordingQuery(): extracts AnnotateRowsEventData.getRowsQuery(), skips signal-table queries, calls offsetContext.setQuery(query) for inclusion in change event source metadata.

use_cases.name: Handle Schema Changes (DDL)
use_cases.description: handleQueryEvent(): processes QUERY events containing DDL. Dispatches SchemaChangeEvent via EventDispatcher. Updates MariaDbDatabaseSchema.

use_cases.name: Handle Streaming Errors
use_cases.description: isRetriable(): walks throwable chain; returns false for SQLException error code 1236 (ER_MASTER_FATAL_ERROR_READING_BINLOG). communicationExceptions() covers IOException and SQLException for retry decisions.

use_cases.name: Publish Change Records to Kafka
use_cases.description: Enqueues DataChangeEvent into ChangeEventQueue. MariaDbConnectorTask.doPoll() calls queue.poll(), maps to SourceRecord list returned to KafkaConnect for Kafka publication.

use_cases.name: Heartbeat / Keep-alive
use_cases.description: HeartbeatFactory creates scheduled heartbeat via MariaDbConnection. BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler handles SQL errors 42000/3D000 during heartbeat queries.

use_cases.name: Stop / Cleanup
use_cases.description: doStop(): closes BinlogConnectorConnection, beanRegistryJdbcConnection, MariaDbDatabaseSchema. BinaryLogClient disconnect handled by ChangeEventSourceCoordinator.

key_relationships: MariaDbErrorHandler extends ErrorHandler; non-retriable SQL error code 1236
MariaDbStreamingChangeEventSource uses BinaryLogClient (shyiko) for raw event delivery
EventDispatcher dispatches to ChangeEventQueue; task polls queue for SourceRecords
BinlogSourceInfo tracks: file, pos, GTID, server_id, thread_id, query, tableIds
important_notes: MariaDB GTID format: domainId-serverId-sequence (not MySQL UUID format)
ANNOTATE_ROWS event = MariaDB equivalent of MySQL ROWS_QUERY; enabled via setUseSendAnnotateRowsEvent(true)
getGtidEventType() returns EventType.MARIADB_GTID; getIncludeQueryEventType() returns EventType.ANNOTATE_ROWS
configureReplicaCompatibility sets mariaDbSlaveCapability=4 for GTID over binlog
SSL modes mapped: DISABLE→DISABLED, TRUST→REQUIRED, VERIFY_CA→VERIFY_CA, VERIFY_FULL→VERIFY_IDENTITY
ChangeEventSourceCoordinator coordinates snapshot then streaming pipeline phases
MariaDbConnectorTask.start() also validates guardrail limits on captured table count
Optional event buffering: EventBuffer used when bufferSizeForStreamingChangeEventSource > 0
